company.name: Meridian Therapeutics, Inc.
company.description: Mid-market specialty pharma: a sterile oncology injectable, an extended-release cardiology tablet, and a cold-chain biologic pre-filled syringe.

notes: SECOND VERTICAL — proves Faultline is config-driven, not hardcoded to food & beverage (impl plan §1.13). Unlike company_profile.json (which references the canonical food fixtures in contracts/fixtures/), this pharma profile is SELF-CONTAINED: it carries its full entity graph inline under `entities` (same $defs shapes — supplier/product/component/bom_edge/graph_edge/inventory_item) because the frozen contracts/fixtures/ are food-only and Session G may not add to contracts/. A config-driven seed_generator consumes `entities` when present, else falls back to fixtures. Inventory is intentionally tight on the two single-source API chains and the cold-chain. Disruptable chains sit at real lat/lon in event-prone regions (Hyderabad floods, Zhejiang typhoons, Memphis ice storms). Validate with: python -m agents.depth.verify_pharma

components.name: Type I borosilicate vial / syringe barrel

suppliers.name: Deccan Active Pharma Ltd
suppliers.profile_semantic: WHO-GMP / US-FDA registered active pharmaceutical ingredient plant in the Genome Valley cluster near Hyderabad, India. Sole-source manufacturer of Meridian's Oncovera cytotoxic API. Low-lying site exposed to monsoon flooding of the Musi river basin.

suppliers.name: Vizag Synthesis Pvt Ltd
suppliers.profile_semantic: US-FDA registered fine-chemical and cytotoxic API manufacturer in Visakhapatnam, India. Qualified second source for the Oncovera active with a containment suite suited to cytotoxics; expedited dispatch via Chennai air freight.

suppliers.name: Taizhou Hua'an Pharmaceutical Co.
suppliers.profile_semantic: Large-volume cardiovascular API producer in the Taizhou chemical zone, Zhejiang, China. Sole source of the Cardioline extended-release active. Coastal site on the East China Sea typhoon track, with periodic regulatory inspection holds.

suppliers.name: Jurong Pharma Synthesis Pte Ltd
suppliers.profile_semantic: Specialty active pharmaceutical ingredient manufacturer on Jurong Island, Singapore. Qualified alternate for the Cardioline ER active with strong regulatory track record and reliable Changi air logistics.

suppliers.name: Lee Valley Biologics Ltd
suppliers.profile_semantic: Mammalian-cell biomanufacturing CMO near Cork, Ireland, producing the Immunova monoclonal antibody drug substance by perfusion culture. Single qualified source; long campaign lead times and strict cold-chain handling from bulk drug substance onward.

suppliers.name: Rheinfelden Bioworks AG
suppliers.profile_semantic: Biologics contract manufacturer near Basel, Switzerland. Qualified alternate for the Immunova drug substance with a comparable cell line and tech-transfer package already on file.

suppliers.name: Saale Glaswerk GmbH
suppliers.profile_semantic: Type I borosilicate pharmaceutical glass converter in Jena, Germany, producing vials and pre-fillable syringe barrels. Sole qualified supplier feeding both sterile products; a single-site chokepoint for the injectable and the biologic.

suppliers.name: Konkan Glass Containers Pvt Ltd
suppliers.profile_semantic: Pharmaceutical Type I glass vial maker near Mumbai, India. Qualified alternate for borosilicate vials with shorter lead time but more limited high-grade capacity.

suppliers.name: Hessen Fine Excipients GmbH
suppliers.profile_semantic: Parenteral-grade excipient producer in Darmstadt, Germany, supplying pharmacopeia mannitol for the lyophilized injectable. Reliable EU logistics and deep buffer stock.

suppliers.name: Aerocold Logistics LLC
suppliers.profile_semantic: Validated 2-8C cold-chain packaging and forwarding hub at the Memphis air-cargo superhub, US. Assembles phase-change shippers for the biologic; throughput concentrates through one airport exposed to winter ice storms and spring tornadoes.

suppliers.name: Zaventem Cold Pharma BV
suppliers.profile_semantic: GDP-certified cold-chain packaging provider at Brussels Airport, Belgium. Qualified alternate cold-chain lane for the biologic, decoupled from the US weather exposure.

suppliers.name: Raritan Coatings Inc
suppliers.profile_semantic: Functional film-coating supplier in New Brunswick, New Jersey, providing the extended-release coating system for the Cardioline tablet.

suppliers.name: Liffey Sterile Fill-Finish Ltd
suppliers.profile_semantic: Tier-1 sterile fill-finish CMO in Dublin, Ireland. Lyophilizes and fills the Oncovera injectable and fills/inspects the Immunova pre-filled syringe; receives API, drug substance, mannitol, vials and cold-chain materials.

suppliers.name: Mandovi Pharma Manufacturing Pvt Ltd
suppliers.profile_semantic: Tier-1 oral solid dose manufacturer in Goa, India, granulating, compressing and coating the Cardioline extended-release tablet from imported API and coating system.

disruptable_chains.name: oncovera-api
disruptable_chains.story: Single WHO-GMP cytotoxic API plant in flood-prone Hyderabad to Dublin sterile fill-finish to the oncology injectable

disruptable_chains.name: cardio-api
disruptable_chains.story: Sole API source in typhoon-exposed Taizhou, Zhejiang to Goa tablet manufacturing to the extended-release tablet

disruptable_chains.name: cold-chain
disruptable_chains.story: 2-8C biologic drug substance routed through the ice-storm-exposed Memphis air-cargo hub to the pre-filled syringe

disruptable_chains.name: glass-vial
disruptable_chains.story: Sole-source Type I borosilicate vials from Jena feed both sterile products

whatif_presets.title: Monsoon flood in Hyderabad API cluster
Ice storm grounds Memphis air-cargo hub
Industrial fire at the Jena glass works
